10584541.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
10584541.description: In this art deco special, George takes on a challenging period property in Newquay, Cornwall. When Gareth and Frances Jenkins bought an ugly-looking pebble-dashed bungalow, they had little idea of the house's astonishing history.
10584541.category: Reality, Home & Garden, Bouwen en verbouwen

10583186.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
10583186.description: George helps more homeowners make their period homes fit for modern life, taking on an outmoded 1930s semi in Liverpool for teachers Simon and Sofie and a stunning medieval farmhouse in Kent that is like a perfectly preserved time capsule.
10583186.category: Reality, Home & Garden, Bouwen en verbouwen
